author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Simulate the actual PCA9685 control path**

This ranks Wokwi CI as the guard before arm hardware, but the arm firmware later standardizes on PCA9685-over-I2C; a serial-output Uno sim won't catch wrong I2C addresses/register writes or ServoEasing/PCA9685 integration errors. Add Wokwi's PCA9685 custom-chip model or a small Custom Chips fixture to the arm CI path so the dry run exercises the same driver stack the real arm uses ([Wokwi Custom Chips docs](https://docs.wokwi.com/chips-api/getting-started)).

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
